failure_modes: duplicate registration IDs or command names fail command-tree construction
editing a Bob-owned composition file causes managed_hash_mismatch
playbook.purpose: Add a Cobra command through a recipe-supported human extension point.

steps.success_condition: the package registers exactly one non-nil command with lowercase-kebab ID
steps.summary: Create the command implementation and register one stable command ID from the human-owned file

steps.success_condition: tests cover command behavior and the global JSON contract where applicable
steps.summary: Create focused command tests including machine-readable output behavior

steps.success_condition: Bob reports no ownership conflict caused by the command files
steps.summary: Confirm the human-owned extension did not introduce Bob ownership drift
Check Bob repository convergence separately from command behavior

playbook.title: Add a CLI command
verification_hints: Glyphrun is selected; add and run a command-specific terminal behavior spec
bob check --json proves repository convergence only
go test ./... verifies repository tests but does not make Bob a behavioral evidence authority
